transcript: Interview Guide. Activity E. FGD:  Aspirations of Youth
Module 1:  Agency, education and innovation (1 hour)
Opinions are divided between step 4, 3,2 and 1.

- I consider myself in 4th stage because I have power and freedom to make many major life decisions as to enter the colleagues, to graduate the university, to get the profession that I wish, to get marry to the person that I will love. But there are a few women who are at the same stage as me, mainly women in village remain in 1 st stage; for example  I know at least three girls that do whatever say their brothers, they have not their own choice and voice.

-But in my opinion women in this society in 3rd step, because all my girlfriends are similar to me. I have freedom and rights to make some major life decisions but I cannot forget my parents, I consult with them before doing important decisions.
-I am in step 2 because I’m too young to decide something without my parents, they know life better than I do and I totally believe in their right decision.

Of course it is useful; education gives the status in society. Educated people have higher IQ than not educated, and knowledge and skills will for sure help to us to find our ways, to reach the goals, and to live easier and more comfortable.
Many boys study till 8th grade then they become passive and the shift to work, computer games, internet or mobile phones or they have friends who support their bad attitude toward the school.

If there are talented students they should have the chance to study in universities/institutes and go further, but if they are not whether they should study hard to be enrolled or they should work. Village environment actually requires secondary school education(professional colleagues).

Yes, last two years girls started to study more than boys therefore parents also started to support such talented girls, they understood that if girls have had the same support as boys they would succeed more than boys could.

To plant vegetables as potato, carrot, cucumber and etc., learn how to manage with cotton, wheat, and flowers, especially they are interested in planting different types of flowers because girls love flowers.
Reasons for ending education? Not good friends?  Family condition ?  Outside interferences
Two most important reasons2 family condition1(outside interferences)

As we told boys are vulnerable, quickly become accustomed to outside interferences: computer games, mobile phones, internet and they totally forget about school; however, there are cases when boys need to work and leave the school to help mother, it may happen when father dies or some of the member is invalid.
-Yes, I want to enter to the university if I don’t pass the exams I want to be an accountant.
-I want to become mathematics/physics teacher.
-I want to be dresser maker
-I want to be poetess, I already wrote the letter to my favorite writer to give me some advices.
Majority students expressed their high interests to continue the study.

To be specialist in their fields, to improve the life condition. We have another one option last years to be farmer and grow up wheat and cotton. Our success women-farmers have very good harvest and can help to their families with additional incomes. They open new job places for other people of community, they become role models for us.
It’s very important to have leading role models women in our community. We have a lot of challenges which hamper development of our young life.
New agricultural or NRM practices To be farmer, open your own farm To plant citrus fruits in green housesGardening developedMedicine centers
Most important for the [sex of the FGD] of the community (top 2)1 open farm2 plant citrus
Most important for the [opposite sex of FGD] of the community (top 2)1 open farm2 plant citrus
Open of new farm is one of the new opportunities for girls. Last time we have more success women-farmers. They develop their farms in different directions.
Some of them – growing wheat and cotton, some of them develop fruits gardens.

Planting of citrus fruits become popular in our village for both genders, it is new trend here. Gardening started to flourish different fruits, their types become popular in local and centers markets.
E.14.1. Which kinds of wheat they planted? We don’t know.

Yes, the same opportunities are given, for example our college director provided land area for each class. Each class members have the appointed land part; our class has green house and each of us care about lemon. We also plant flowers in nearby area.
Some young girls can be busy only by household duties. Some of them interested in receiving of news relating of new practice. We have the same opportunities as the boys.
But usually people prefer to speak with boys and men. Mostly head of organizations are men. That is why they prefer to speak to men.
Module 2.  Gender norms, livelihoods, and family formation (1 ˝ hours)
Important crops or livestock for [sex of FGD] Now-wheatlemon-turkey-cows? sheep
Important crops or livestock for [sex of FGD]Ten years ago-cows? sheep? tomato (vegetables)

Due to development of national agricultural policy and opening of new bank branches there are women-farmers in our province.  At last years, we have some new women-farmers. They are very good organizers.
New practice of growing citrus fruits  developed here, earlier our village people grow only our fruits, then turkeys are also became the symbol of our area.
Men and women doing the same agricultural activities.it doesn’t matter of gender.
Nothing will happen many boys help their families.

We cannot see any barriers to sell our products, some of the girls plant vegetables in their house plot and they sell them in bazaars it is normal situation here, young girls help to the family and leave some money for their being.
Usually women and children farms plots because men employed in state organizations. It’s casual picture when head of the family  (man) decides  who will do it and when.
Only when father or grandfather died it could be done by the women.
Usually they have common plot.
We do not divide this is man’s land this is woman’s land. We work together doesn’t depend on whose land is it I mean gender difference.
Woman and man will address to specialist to the agronomists, successful farmers.
If he things in this way he will not permitted her to join to other women.
Sit at home and do house works, who will cook? Who will care after children?
I think no, he will not allow to do her own business if she doesn’t manage with house works.
It is ok, because almost 80% of women sell their home made products in the markets.
If he sits at home and does not earn money and his wife earns money outside it will be shame to him, because his friend will censure him.
He will afraid of society, because the society –friends will say: “look she is a leader in family”.

Gender equality is good, because it will provide to women the same opportunities as to men. But family issues are a little bit different because it comes from religious prospective that man is higher than woman. “Man is the head and woman is the neck” Actually it seems that head (man) is higher and more important but in reality is vice versa.
If they work in cooperation in one field so they will solve the problems and take the decision together.
It depends but woman is likely to sell because the nature gives her foxy character so she will deal better with trade.
If they see the profit and success of the sister they will be eager to learn it together.
Very easy …………………….….…1Easy………………………………..….2Neither easy nor difficult…… 3Difficult ………………………………4Very difficult……………………….5
For Diana to go ahead and spend her inheritance without David’s support? 5
As we previously motioned the quotation : “Man is the head and woman is the neck.” It may be very difficult but if woman plans she will get it.
For David to go ahead and spend his inheritance without Diana’s support? 4
We don’t think that young woman can easily walk alone to market, it depends if she goes to buy products it is ok, but if she wants to sell she should inform family members.
No, she cannot she needs to ask the permission from husband and mother in law.
It depends on woman, if she is smart she can do it easily.
7. she can freely but she should inform and get the permission if the pace is far away.
If she has relatives or acquaintances in city she may live and work there, but if she is alone it will be hard to her explain the situation and convenience family.
Depends on the job in which they worked. If they succeed in high position so everybody in village will be desirous to them, but if they work in dirty works the society will blame them.
19-20 years old young woman can get married here; this age is concerned as high time for building family. Mothers in law send their daughters in law to the medical centers to escape the bad outcomes.
Young people decide themselves to whom they will marry.
Young people should decide themselves as it is their lives, but do not forget about parents suggestions and their point of views.
At 20-21 age.
It is high time to give a birth to the first baby.
20-21 age when the organism of the young woman is ready to be a mother.
No, they do not plan children.

We would like to have organizations that will search for talented young people; give support for them, because we have many students here who are talented but they do not have opportunity to implement, develop or to show to the whole Republic. For instance we know one boy who draws wonderful pictures but parents are not happy because they think that he will not able to earn money doing such work.
We want to open new shops to enlarge the number of working place.
To build parks for youth.
To organize kindergarten and make women’ life easier
